briefs.title: BC Gaming Facilities Must Meet New Security and Surveillance Rules by April 2026
briefs.summary: A new Security and Surveillance Regulation takes effect April 13, 2026 for provincial gaming facilities in BC. It sets out strict rules for who can enter secure areas, how cash must be handled and monitored, and what surveillance systems must cover — including cash cages (rooms where cashier transactions happen), count rooms (where cash from games is counted), and cash movement between vaults, vehicles, and cages.
briefs.action_required: Review your facility's security and surveillance systems now to ensure compliance before April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Security and Surveillance Regulation for gaming facilities takes effect
